title: Xtra Crunchy Croatian Pepper Skillet
description: A tangy and crunchy solo dinner dish featuring roasted peppers, cooked in a ttukbaegi earthenware skillet, with ayurvedic rajasic friendly ingredients.
instructions: Place the bell peppers on a baking sheet and roast for 30 minutes.
Remove the peppers from the oven and let them cool.
Peel the skin off the peppers and slice them into strips.
Heat the olive oil in a ttukbaegi earthenware skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion to the skillet and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the roasted pepper strips to the skillet and stir to combine.
Sprinkle the crushed crackers over the top of the peppers and cook for 2 minutes.
If using feta cheese, sprinkle it over the top of the peppers and cook until it is melted.
